executives.name: Andrew S. Marsh
executives.background: Andrew S. Marsh is Chair of the Board and Chief Executive Officer of Entergy. He previously served as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer from 2013 to 2022. He joined Entergy in 1998 and has held various leadership roles in strategic planning and finance.

tenure_dates.title: Chair of the Board and Chief Executive Officer
Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Kimberly A. Fontan
executives.background: Kimberly A. Fontan is Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer. She previously served as Senior Vice President and Chief Accounting Officer from 2019 to 2022. She has been with Entergy since 1996.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer
Senior Vice President and Chief Accounting Officer

executives.name: Peter S. Norelli
executives.background: Peter S. Norelli is Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer. He joined Entergy in 2022 from NextEra Energy, where he held various leadership positions in power generation and operations.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer

executives.name: Marcus V. Brown
executives.background: Marcus V. Brown is Executive Vice President and General Counsel. He has served in this role since 2013 and joined Entergy in 1995.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and General Counsel

board_of_directors.name: Andrew S. Marsh
board_of_directors.background: Chair of the Board and CEO of Entergy Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: John R. Caslione
board_of_directors.background: Founder, President and CEO of GCS Business Capital, LLC. Expert in global business strategy and emerging markets.

board_of_directors.name: Edith P. G. Kelly-Lowney
board_of_directors.background: Former Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of Dial Corporation. Extensive experience in finance and accounting.

board_of_directors.name: Stuart L. Levenick
board_of_directors.background: Former Group President of Caterpillar Inc. Lead Independent Director of Entergy.

board_of_directors.name: Blanche L. Lincoln
board_of_directors.background: Founder and Principal of Lincoln Policy Group. Former U.S. Senator from Arkansas.

board_of_directors.name: Karen A. Puckett
board_of_directors.background: Former President and CEO of Harte Hanks, Inc. Former President of CenturyLink.

sources.source_description: Entergy Corporation Form 10-K for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2023
